search.name: ButtonSoundRoot
search.keywords:
buttonsoundroot these are the tones that most motorola interaction sounds make

for button bad on mototrbo models, just layer 300 and 600 

tone 900: is used for most good button presses on all radios
tone 300: is used for most bad button presses, most notably on apx models
tone 600: is used in conjunction with 300 to make the bad button sound for mototrbo models

dtr600and700 these are the sounds that motorola dtr600 and dtr700 radios use for ui nav and ptt.

sounds were recorded from the headphone port on the radio and may have an audible click, a few files have been adjusted but may still have a click.
